Notes: Artie Williams led New Paltz with 14 points and six rebounds. Kristen Caban
and Kristin Sitek each chipped in with 10 points. Toya Parks led Buffalo
Game.Officials: Betsy Manware,  Floyd Douglas,  Frank Kennelly
